sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39764" key="e)piklite/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-κλῐτέον</orth>, <sense id="n39764.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must fold in, turn in</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:25:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.25.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
